entities.name: Meeting Block System
entities.context: Framework for intelligently selecting content blocks based on meeting content

entities.name: B01 Recap
entities.context: Required meeting block for summarizing discussion

entities.name: B02 Commitments
entities.context: Required meeting block for tracking commitments made

entities.name: B25 Deliverables
entities.context: Required meeting block for documenting deliverables

entities.name: B26 Metadata
entities.context: Required meeting block for meeting metadata

entities.name: B05 Questions
entities.context: Conditional block for questions raised during meeting

entities.name: B07 Warm Intros
entities.context: Conditional block for tracking promised introductions

entities.name: B08 Stakeholder Intel
entities.context: Conditional block for external relationship intelligence

entities.name: B14 Implementation
entities.context: Conditional block for concrete implementation plans

entities.name: B15 Energy/Sentiment
entities.context: Conditional block for relationship meeting sentiment tracking

entities.name: B16 Follow-up
entities.context: Conditional block for specific follow-up actions

entities.name: B17 Content Assets
entities.context: Conditional block for resources and assets mentioned

entities.name: B20 Brand Voice
entities.context: Conditional block for external stakeholder voice capture

entities.name: B22 Risks
entities.context: Conditional block for risks and concerns

entities.name: B23 Context
entities.context: Conditional block for ongoing relationship context

entities.name: B24 Product Ideas
entities.context: Conditional block for features and improvements discussed

entities.name: Block Prioritization
entities.context: Priority ranking system (1-3) for meeting blocks
